details.note: 3 duplicate PRs exist for the same vulnerability - manual cleanup recommended (close #5 and #8, keep #16)

details.description: actions/checkout@v1 and actions/setup-java@v1 are severely outdated (current: v4). JDK 1.8 is EOL.
details.reason: GitHub token lacks 'workflows' permission to push .github/workflows changes

details.description: Both package-lock.json and yarn.lock exist. package-lock.json has hot-formula-parser@3.0.0, yarn.lock has @3.0.2 - version inconsistency

details.reason: Intentional for demo purposes - designed to show Dependabot updates

details.issue: README.md typos ('Securty' on line 24 and 'The enable' on line 30)
